subject: Re: S76C++
body:
pay it


----- Original Message ----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 5:07:50 PM
Subject: FW: S76C++


Please advise if it is ok to pay $100,000.
 
 
Rich Kahn
New York Strategy Group LLC
457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor
New York, NY 10021
tel 212-891-6430
fax 212-750-2408
cell 917-414-7584


 
From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Thursday, January 24, 2008 3:55 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com
Subject: S76C++
 
Darren and Rich,
I received a call from Chris Shurkus, we still owe the 100K for our S76. Please advise if we are going to pay, also Sikorsky is MAYBE willing to relive us of the Second S76 order and refund our 2 million dollars if we elect to keep the present S76. However I have no negotiating power if we do not pay them what we owe.
Chris is willing to help in any means but is getting heat from his president on our final payment.
Larry V






Start the year off right. Easy ways to stay in shape in the new year.
